title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF BARRIO BEGA, BUTUAN CITY, TO BARRIO EL RIO

chunks.text:
H. No. 6804 / 65 OG No. 8, 1818 (February 24, 1969)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 4996, June 17, 1967 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF BARRIO BEGA, BUTUAN CITY, TO BARRIO EL RIO

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The name of Barrio Bega, Butuan City, is hereby changed to Barrio El Rio.

Sec. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted without Executive approval, June 17, 1967.
